title: Cascading Moon
description: An add-on for Enhanced Celestials, adding a Cascading Moon that grants low gravity, and increases turtle spawns!
body:
During the super rare Cascading Moon event, you will find gravity has been lowered for yourself and all mobs! Due to the change in the moon, turtles will have majorly increased spawns, as they are taking this opportunity to migrate early!

All credit for Enhanced Celestials goes to the original author CorgiTaco.

Credit as well to Draconic Archer for making many other add-ons for Enhanced Celestials!
